stemHtml: Which weather conditions are most likely to be connected with a flat/uniform pressure distribution?

options.a: The development of local wind systems, like the sea breeze or the valley wind.
options.b: Frontal depressions with extended areas of clouds and precipitation.
options.c: In summer extended areas of dense fog, eventually with light drizzle.
options.d: Lines of heavy thunderstorms, i.e. convergence lines or squall lines.
